<h1 class=""elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default"">A Word from Our Founder &amp

<div class=""elementor-element elementor-element-4039ed8 elementor-widget elementor-widget-text-editor"" data-id=""4039ed8"" data-element_type=""widget"" data-e-type=""widget"" data-widget_type=""text-editor.default"">

Hello, I’m Tusher Khondokar, the Founder and CEO of WP BigBang. As someone deeply passionate about web technology, design, and crafting digital experiences that deliver measurable results, I launched this agency with a clear vision: to empower businesses—small and large, across borders—to grow online using the power, flexibility, and accessibility of WordPress.

With over 15 years of dedication to web development, UI/UX, enterprise solutions, and virtual assistance—serving clients in the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and Bangladesh—I’ve witnessed firsthand how a well-designed and strategically developed website can transform businesses and connect them with global audiences.

At WP BigBang, we don’t just build websites
column2:
we craft digital platforms that tell your brand story, enhance user experience, and drive real business growth. By combining cutting-edge WordPress solutions with 24/7 white-labeled support, agile development, and a results-oriented approach, our mission is to make your success our own.

I’m proud of our team, proud of the trust our clients place in us, and committed to keeping innovation, integrity, and client satisfaction at the heart of everything we do.

Thank you for being part of our journey.
— Tusher Khondokar, Founder &

What types of businesses do you work with?

From small start-ups, to large corporations, to nonprofits, B2B to B2C, we work with a wide array of companies in many business sectors, including technology, food, apparel, health + beauty, camps, travel, finance, arts, and fair trade.
What services does your digital agency provide?

Our agency offers a full range of digital marketing services, including website design and development, app development, graphic design, search engine optimization (SEO), and more. We work with clients to create customized strategies that meet their specific needs and goals.
How does your digital agency measure success?

<div id=""elementor-tab-content-9773"" class=""elementor-tab-content elementor-clearfix"" data-tab=""3"" role=""region"" aria-labelledby=""elementor-tab-title-9773"">We use a variety of metrics to measure success, depending on the services we&#8217
column2: re providing and the goals of the client. Some common metrics we track include website traffic, engagement rates, conversion rates, ROI, and search engine rankings. We provide regular reporting to clients to ensure they are informed of progress and any necessary adjustments to their digital marketing strategies.

column1: How long does it take to see results from digital marketing?

The timeline for seeing results from digital marketing can vary depending on a number of factors, such as the services being provided, the industry, and the competitiveness of the market. Generally, we advise clients to expect to see some results within the first few months, but significant improvements may take several months or more to achieve.
Is your office physically located somewhere?
Yes, we are physically located in the United Kingdom, the United States, and Bangladesh.
